heading: Presidential Award for Extraordinary Efforts To Combat Trafficking in Persons
label: 7109b Presidential Award for Extraordinary Efforts To Combat Trafficking in Persons
notes: Amendments2023—Subsec. (d). substituted “2022 through 2027” for “2008 through 2011”.Pub. L. 117–347
amendments: Amendments2023—Subsec. (d). substituted “2022 through 2027” for “2008 through 2011”.Pub. L. 117–347

children.text: individuals who are United States citizens or foreign nationals; and
United States or foreign nongovernmental organizations.

children.heading: Selection
children.label: b Selection
children.text: The President shall establish procedures for selecting recipients of the award authorized under subsection (a).

children.heading: Ceremony
children.label: c Ceremony
children.text: The Secretary of State shall host an annual ceremony for recipients of the award authorized under subsection (a) as soon as practicable after the date on which the Secretary submits to Congress the report required under . The Secretary of State may pay the travel costs of each recipient and a guest of each recipient who attends the ceremony.section 7107(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated, for each of the fiscal years 2022 through 2027, such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section.
